articles.title: 'This Should Not Be Possible': Developer Calls for Steam Refund Policy to Change, After Fans Complete Bitesize Game in Under 2 Hours, Leave Great Reviews — Then Get Money Back Anyway - IGN
articles.description: A Steam game developer has called for the storefront's refund policy to be changed, after players who praised its bitesize game were still able to get their money back.

articles.title: These 5 Android apps are so good, I'm surprised they're free - Android Authority
articles.description: Free Android apps almost always have some catch. These don't — no paywalls, no subscriptions, not even ads.

articles.title: Rumour: Xbox Still Evaluating Whether Project Helix Will Support Physical Discs - Pure Xbox
articles.description: It reportedly hasn't been "fully finalised" yet

articles.title: Should Palworld Players Wipe Their Data for 1.0 This Week? Pocketpair Offers Official Advice - IGN
articles.description: Palworld’s hotly anticipated 1.0 update launches this week, on July 10, and now developer Pocketpair has narrowed the release timing down, while issuing existing players an official recommendation on whether they should wipe their data for it.

articles.title: We Posted a $100 Mario 64 Bounty 30 Years Ago. It's Time to Settle Our Debt! - IGN
articles.description: It's been 30 years since we posted our bounty about unlocking Luigi in Mario 64, so it’s time to finish this. Let’s settle our debt once and for all.
